title: Bigamea hamata

uses: Bigamea hamata, which is also known as the Devil's Claw plant, has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant's root is rich in compounds called harpagoside and harpagide, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. Modern research suggests that Bigamea hamata may have potential in treating chronic pain and other conditions.
